series_metadata.series_description: Retain digital copy, which is continually updated and maintained for duration of active Sales Agent License, for two (2) years after agent cancellation date; then transfer to Cancelled Agents Application/ Agreement/Bonds file see 950-0630).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain digital copy, which is continually updated and maintained for duration of active Sales Agent License, after agent cancellation date, transfer to Cancelled Agents Application/ Agreement/Bonds file 950-0630 For cancellation/denial applications, retain for two (2) years, then destroy., Electronic: Delete
